# SIMS Nepal - llms.txt
# Last Updated: May 2026

## Overview
SIMS Nepal is a modern, cloud-based *Student Information Management System (SIMS)* built specifically for schools and educational institutions in Nepal. It helps schools transition from paper-based or fragmented systems to a unified digital platform for student records, academics, attendance, finance, and administration.

*Core Purpose*: Simplify school administration, improve data accuracy, enable real-time parent communication, and reduce paperwork while maintaining full compliance with Nepal’s Ministry of Education guidelines.

## Key Features

### Academics & Grading
- Course & subject management
- Assignment tracking and evaluation
- GPA calculation and grade ledger
- Automated report card / transcript generation
- Term and academic year configuration

### Attendance Management
- Daily student and staff attendance
- Real-time SMS notifications to parents
- Monthly attendance reports and percentage calculation
- Holiday calendar integration

### Single Sign-On (SSO)
- Native integration with Hamro App and Hamro Business ecosystem
- Unified login across modules
- Secure cross-platform access

### Financial Management
- Fee collection and invoicing
- Payroll and expense tracking
- Financial reports and statements

### Additional Modules
- Library & resource management
- Advanced reporting, analytics, and dashboards
- Data export (CSV, Excel)
- Human Resource Management (upcoming)

## Target Users
- Secondary and higher secondary schools in Nepal
- Private and public educational institutions
- School administrators, teachers, and office staff

## Pricing Plans

*One-Time Installation Charge: NPR **10,000*  
(This covers initial setup, data migration, training, and configuration.)

*Monthly Recurring Fee: NPR **10 per student per month*

### Pricing Examples
- 500 students → NPR 5,000 / month (after one-time 10k)
- 1,000 students → NPR 10,000 / month
- 2,000 students → NPR 20,000 / month
- 5,000 students → NPR 50,000 / month

*Key Benefits of This Model*:
- Highly affordable and scalable for schools of all sizes
- Predictable costs that grow with the number of students
- No hidden charges for core features or basic support
- Suitable for both small private schools and large institutions

## Compliance & Values
- Fully aligned with Ministry of Education, Nepal standards
- Strong focus on data security, simplicity, and performance in low-bandwidth environments
- Cloud-native with high uptime guarantee
